description.en: Nymphs and adults suck developing grains, causing empty or partially filled grains. DOA estimates a 3–5% yield reduction in Sri Lanka. Natural enemies — especially the egg parasitoid *Gryon nixoni* — help suppress populations.

description.quote: Sucks the developing grains causing empty or partially filled grains. Both nymphs and adults damage the grains. The pest reportedly reduces rice yield by an estimated 3-5% in Sri Lanka. Gryon nixoni being noted as the most prevalent egg parasitoid in Sri Lanka.
